resources.string: Policies active — server sync via push
Alerts when web domains are blocked by policy
%1$s is blocked by your Guardian policy.
Some traffic on this website has been blocked.
Access request sent to your parent.
Your daily allowance is used up.
Persistent alert when screen time is exhausted
Link this device to your Guardian dashboard.
Point your camera at the pairing QR code from your parent dashboard.
Prevents the protection app from being cleared or uninstalled without authorization.
Safeguards network traffic and filters inappropriate web endpoints automatically.
Monitors app activity timers and applies remote schedule updates.
Setup complete. You can now close this app. All filtering profiles, usage rules, and configuration changes are managed directly from your parent web interface.
Unable to locate your server. Please confirm your local network path is accurate.
Could not read that QR code. Please try again with the code from your Guardian dashboard.
Having trouble connecting. Check your network and try again.
Camera access is needed to scan your pairing code.
This profile is managed by Guardian
Waiting for the main profile to finish setup. Open Guardian on the primary account first.
Screen time stays paused until the clock is fixed or a parent enters their code.
This owner profile is locked. Enter the parental access code from the dashboard to unlock it.
Monitors watched YouTube videos for parental controls.
